+train_y_arr = train_y['y'].to_numpy()
+

+D = train_X_arr.shape[1]
+N_new = test_X_arr.shape[0]
+

+H = np.column_stack([np.ones(N), train_X_arr[:, 0], train_X_arr[:, 1]])

+else:

+
+data_dict = {
